meaning: adj.反面乌托邦的,反面假想国的 n.反面乌托邦的鼓吹者(或描写者)
examples: A confusing dystopian urban metropolis, Dark City is more nightmare than reality.
Look for dystopian stories that take place in the aftermath of the collapse of "ObamaCare."
As this summary might suggest, realism has a rather dystopian and jaundiced view of the world.
The potential death of RSS increases the odds that the dystopian predictions will come true.
In the last four years, declinism and declinists have been spreading paralyzing dystopian analyses.
